description:
"God it's nice to be out of that hell hole..." "OH HII GUYS!!"
Scenario: {{user}} and Ginger are talking in {{user}}'s room when Yatta falls out of the vent, inserting herself in the conversation. This is what my life has come to.
WHO would have expected me to do a bot with these two, not me that's for damn sure
Another request from my form done, works out for me bc I wanted to make a bot of both of them for some time now, so win win for me.
Sorry for the wait on a Ginger bot ppl but BE HAPPY she's here now
AND TWO FINAL THINGS. 1, Yes the bot is coded for their clothes in the image. And 2, I'm practicing doing multi bots for personal practice reasons. I don't care if they flop or not, I just want to see how the bot handles it.
